# DepScope
> Package Intelligence for AI Agents

DepScope checks package health, vulnerabilities, versions, error-to-fix resolution, and stack compatibility so AI agents don't have to. We do the work once, every agent benefits.

Current scale: 14,700+ packages indexed across 17 ecosystems, 402 vulnerabilities tracked, 12 MCP tools, 3 verticals on one shared free API.

Positioning: save tokens, save energy, ship safer code.

## API
Base URL: https://depscope.dev
Authentication: None required for public endpoints. Optional API keys (`ds_live_xxx` / `ds_test_xxx`) for higher limits and usage analytics via magic-link login.
Rate Limit: 200 req/min anonymous
Response Format: JSON (or plain text on /api/prompt)

## Endpoints

### Check Package (full report)
GET /api/check/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: health score (0-100), vulnerabilities, versions, recommendation
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/check/npm/express

### LLM-optimized plain text (saves ~74% tokens)
GET /api/prompt/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: same info as /check, pre-formatted as compact plain text for LLM consumption
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/prompt/pypi/django
Use: when the response is fed directly into an LLM context window

### Latest Version (fastest)
GET /api/latest/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: just the latest version number and deprecation status
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/latest/npm/react
Use: before suggesting any package install

### Package Exists
GET /api/exists/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: true/false
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/exists/npm/mypackage
Use: before suggesting any package to avoid hallucinating names

### Search Packages
GET /api/search/{ecosystem}?q={keywords}
Returns: list of matching packages with descriptions
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/search/npm?q=http+client
Use: when user needs a package for a specific purpose

### Alternatives
GET /api/alternatives/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: alternative packages with reasons
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/alternatives/npm/request
Use: when a package is deprecated or unhealthy

### Compare Packages
GET /api/compare/{ecosystem}/{pkg1},{pkg2},{pkg3}
Returns: ranked comparison with winner
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/compare/npm/express,fastify,hono

### Vulnerabilities
GET /api/vulns/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: CVEs affecting the latest version only (not historical)
Example: curl https://depscope.dev/api/vulns/pypi/django

### Scan Project
POST /api/scan
Body: {"ecosystem":"npm","packages":{"express":"*","lodash":"*"}}
Returns: project risk level and per-package audit

### Health Score
GET /api/health/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: score (0-100) with breakdown by: maintenance, security, popularity, maturity, community

### Health History (Level 2)
GET /api/history/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: 90-day health trend with data points

### Dependency Tree (Level 2)
GET /api/tree/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: transitive dependencies with per-node health

### Bundle Size (Level 2)
GET /api/bundle/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: min+gzip bundle size estimation

### TypeScript Quality (Level 2)
GET /api/types/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: TypeScript typing quality and DefinitelyTyped coverage

### License Audit (Level 2)
GET /api/licenses/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: license aggregation across deps, risk flags

### Trending (public)
GET /api/trending
Returns: currently trending packages across all ecosystems

## Vertical 2 — Error -> Fix Database

### Error full-text search
GET /api/error
Query: ?q={keywords}&limit=5
Returns: verified matches (pattern, solution, confidence, source URL)

### Error resolve (POST a stack trace)
POST /api/error/resolve
Body: {"error":"...stack trace or message...","context":{}}
Returns: exact_match | similar_matches | not_found — with solution steps + source URL
Use: when an agent hits a runtime error, before searching the web

### Error by hash
GET /api/error/{hash}
Returns: a single verified error entry by its stable sha256 signature

## Vertical 3 — Compatibility Matrix

GET /api/compat
Query: ?stack=next@15,react@19,prisma@6
Returns: verified | compatible | incompatible | warning | untested — with similar verified stacks if no exact match
Use: before suggesting a version bump or new dep addition

POST /api/compat
Body: {"packages":{"next":"15","react":"19","prisma":"6"}}
Returns: same as GET but supports arbitrary stack shapes

## Vertical 4 — Known Bugs per version

GET /api/bugs/{ecosystem}/{package}
Query: ?version={affected_version}
Returns: non-CVE known bugs (regressions, production incidents, edge cases that never reached a CVE)
Use: when a user reports unexpected behavior — often a known bug in that specific version with a documented fix

GET /api/bugs/search
Query: ?q={keywords}&limit=20
Returns: free-text search across the bug database

## Vertical 5 — Breaking Changes per major version

GET /api/breaking/{ecosystem}/{package}
Query: ?from_version={major}&to_version={major}
Returns: verified breaking changes between two major versions, each with migration_hint (codemod / config diff / replacement API)
Coverage: React 18->19, Next 14->15 & 15->16, Prisma 5->6, Express 4->5, Node 18->20->22, TypeScript, ESLint 8->9, Tailwind 3->4, Vite 5->6, Pydantic v1->v2, SQLAlchemy 1.4->2.0, Django 4->5, Python 3.11->3.13, Rust edition 2024
Use: BEFORE suggesting a major-version bump

## Alternatives — deprecated / unhealthy package replacements

GET /api/alternatives/{ecosystem}/{package}
Returns: curated alternatives sorted by score. Each entry has {name, reason, builtin}. `builtin: true` flags language/stdlib replacements (fs.rm, crypto.randomUUID, std::sync::LazyLock) that are NOT installable from a registry.
Use: when `/api/check` recommendation is `find_alternative`, or when the user asks "what should I use instead of X"

## Current Time
GET /api/now
Returns: current UTC date, time, unix timestamp, day of week

## Ecosystems (17)
npm, pypi, cargo, go, composer, maven, nuget, rubygems, pub, hex, swift, cocoapods, cpan, hackage, cran, conda, homebrew

## Health Score Breakdown
- Maintenance (25): days since last release
- Security (25): known CVEs from OSV
- Popularity (20): weekly downloads
- Maturity (15): total version count
- Community (15): active maintainers

## Recommendation Actions
- safe_to_use: package is healthy
- update_required: has vulnerabilities, update to latest
- use_with_caution: low health score
- find_alternative: deprecated
- do_not_use: critical vulnerabilities

## MCP (14 tools)
npm install -g depscope-mcp
Remote URL: https://depscope.dev/mcp
Tools:
  Package health:   check_package, get_health_score, get_vulnerabilities,
                    get_latest_version, package_exists, get_package_prompt,
                    compare_packages, scan_project
  Verticals:        find_alternatives, get_breaking_changes, get_known_bugs,
                    check_compatibility, resolve_error, search_errors

## Integration
- ChatGPT Actions: https://depscope.dev/openapi-gpt.json
- OpenAPI spec: https://depscope.dev/openapi.json
- AI Plugin: https://depscope.dev/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- MCP Server: https://github.com/vincenzorubino27031980/depscope-mcp
- NPM: npm install -g depscope-mcp

## Contact
depscope@cuttalo.com
